verificationNote: Indicative requirements for ISO 27001:2022 physical controls. Not verbatim ISO text.

requirements.requirement: Define and implement physical security perimeters with appropriate barriers to protect areas containing sensitive information and assets.
Implement entry controls for secure areas ensuring only authorized personnel gain access, with visitor management procedures.
Continuously monitor premises for unauthorized physical access using surveillance and intrusion detection systems.
Design and implement protections against physical and environmental threats including fire, flood, earthquake, and power failure.
Enforce clear desk and clear screen policies to prevent unauthorized access to information left unattended.
Manage storage media throughout their lifecycle with appropriate handling, transport, and secure disposal procedures.
Verify that equipment containing storage media is securely sanitized or physically destroyed prior to disposal or reuse.
